v.text: Gallery remains projection-only: Matrix debug truth stays on Model -100, canonical examples stay on Models 1003-1006, and Three scene truth stays on Models 1007/1008.
Projection over the 0213 Matrix debug surface. Reads authoritative labels from Models -100 and -2; does not mirror trace truth into Gallery state.
Same-page summary of schema-only, page-asset, and parent-mounted examples without copying canonical truth into Gallery-owned models.
Model 1003 remains schema-only: `_field_order` defines the leaf contract without adding `page_asset_v0`.
Gallery projects the 0216 parent-mounted ThreeScene surface and child audit log directly from Models 1007/1008.

v.title: Wave E: TraceFlow Components (ProgressBar, Divider, Breadcrumb, StatCard trend)
